creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-office/2022-October/001184.html> the replies have additional white space, but no underscore. 

In this case, the origin is probably the en dash:

    –

– in my edition to the summary line of bug 267057. 

<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_activity.cgi?id=267057>
